title: CI/CD for Quantum Applications: Automating Quantum Software Delivery
description: Master continuous integration and continuous deployment pipelines tailored for quantum computing applications. Learn to automate testing, validation, and deployment of quantum circuits and hybrid quantum-classical systems.
learningObjectives: Design CI/CD pipelines specifically for quantum software projects
Implement automated testing strategies for quantum circuits including simulation and hardware validation
Configure multi-stage pipelines that handle both classical and quantum components
Set up automated circuit optimization and transpilation in deployment workflows
Manage quantum hardware credentials and backend selection in CI/CD systems
Implement rollback strategies and canary deployments for quantum services
